SEARCH
Package DAO

Class CustomerDAO

java.lang.Object
DAO.CustomerDAO
public class CustomerDAO extends Object
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing Customer entities. [Image of customer database table schema] Handles creating, retrieving, and updating customer records in the database. Distinguishes between REGULAR customers and SUBSCRIBERS.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CustomerDAO()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    createCustomer(Customer customer)
    Creates a new customer/subscriber in the DB and updates the object's ID.
    private Customer
    createCustomerFromResultSet(ResultSet rs)
    Helper method to map a ResultSet row to a Customer object.
    ArrayList<Customer>
    getAllCustomers()
    Returns a list of all customers who are of type SUBSCRIBER.
    Customer
    getCustomerByCustomerId(int SubscriberId)
    Fetches a customer by their unique internal Database ID (customer_id).
    Customer
    getCustomerByEmail(String customerMail)
    Fetches a customer by their email regardless of type.
    Customer
    getCustomerByEmailSUBSCRIBER(String customerMail)
    Fetches a customer by email, strictly filtering for SUBSCRIBER type.
    Customer
    getCustomerBySubscriberCode(int SubscriberCode)
    Fetches a subscriber by their unique Subscriber Code.
    boolean
    updateCustomerDetails(Customer customer)
    Updates an existing customer's contact details based on their subscriber code.

  • Constructor Details

    • CustomerDAO

      public CustomerDAO()

  • Method Details

    • createCustomer

      public boolean createCustomer(Customer customer)
      Creates a new customer/subscriber in the DB and updates the object's ID. Uses RETURN_GENERATED_KEYS to retrieve the auto-incremented ID.
      Parameters:
      customer - The Customer object to persist.
      Returns:
      true if the customer was successfully created.

    • getCustomerBySubscriberCode

      public Customer getCustomerBySubscriberCode(int SubscriberCode)
      Fetches a subscriber by their unique Subscriber Code.
      Parameters:
      SubscriberCode - The unique subscriber code.
      Returns:
      The Customer object if found, otherwise null.

    • getCustomerByCustomerId

      public Customer getCustomerByCustomerId(int SubscriberId)
      Fetches a customer by their unique internal Database ID (customer_id).
      Parameters:
      SubscriberId - The primary key ID of the customer.
      Returns:
      The Customer object if found, otherwise null.

    • getCustomerByEmailSUBSCRIBER

      public Customer getCustomerByEmailSUBSCRIBER(String customerMail)
      Fetches a customer by email, strictly filtering for SUBSCRIBER type.
      Parameters:
      customerMail - The customer's email.
      Returns:
      The Customer object if found and is a subscriber.

    • getCustomerByEmail

      public Customer getCustomerByEmail(String customerMail)
      Fetches a customer by their email regardless of type.
      Parameters:
      customerMail - The customer's email.
      Returns:
      The Customer object if found.

    • updateCustomerDetails

      public boolean updateCustomerDetails(Customer customer)
      Updates an existing customer's contact details based on their subscriber code.
      Parameters:
      customer - The Customer object containing updated details.
      Returns:
      true if the update was successful.

    • getAllCustomers

      public ArrayList<Customer> getAllCustomers()
      Returns a list of all customers who are of type SUBSCRIBER.
      Returns:
      ArrayList of Customer objects.

    • createCustomerFromResultSet

      private Customer createCustomerFromResultSet(ResultSet rs) throws SQLException
      Helper method to map a ResultSet row to a Customer object.
      Parameters:
      rs - The ResultSet positioned at the current row.
      Returns:
      The mapped Customer object.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.
